news.title: Meta reportedly scraps advanced in-house AI chip, deepens reliance on Nvidia and AMD
news.description: Meta's push to design its own AI chips has reportedly hit major technical and strategic setbacks, forcing the company to scrap its most ambitious in-house training processor and lean more heavily on external suppliers, according to The Information.
